prestazioni: Upgrade the 2GR-FXS 3.5L V6 hybrid powertrain with a **Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger** (8-10 psi boost) paired with a **CTS Turbo intercooler core** (custom-machined for the Highlander’s front-end airflow) to achieve ~400whp while retaining the hybrid battery assist for instant torque fill. Requires **AEM Infinity 8 ECU** with a custom hybrid-specific calibration to manage the supercharger, battery regeneration, and CVT torque limits.

Replace the stock **P310 hybrid transaxle** with a **Level 10 Motorsports CVT reinforcement kit** (includes billet torque converter, upgraded valve body, and reinforced belt) to handle the increased power. Pair with a **PRL Motorsports CVT cooler** (dual-core, 12-row) and **Red Line CVT Fluid** (NS-3 spec) for sustained high-load performance.

Install a **Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel header** (designed for the 2GR-FXS) with a **Borla Pro XS cat-back exhaust** (dual 3.5" outlets, hybrid-specific tuning for drone reduction). Add a **GReddy E-Manage Ultimate** piggyback controller to fine-tune the hybrid system’s throttle response and eliminate the CVT’s default torque reduction under boost.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit** (2020-2023 Highlander-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 2" flares) paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels** (20x10 +35 front, 20x11 +40 rear, 5x114.3 hub-centric) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear) for aggressive stance and grip.

Replace the stock hybrid badging with a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (functional venting for the intercooler) and **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser** (3D-printed ABS, Highlander-specific fitment). Add **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (DRL/low-beam combo, 5500K) and **Anzo USA taillight overlays** (smoked with sequential turn signals).

Install a **Rotiform LHR split-spoke wheel spacer kit** (15mm front, 25mm rear, hub-centric) to push the wheels to the fender lips. Lower the suspension with **KW Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable, hybrid-specific spring rates) and **SPL Parts front/rear sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) to reduce body roll while maintaining hybrid battery clearance.
